changes.value:
swissarmyhammer-kanban/tests/command_dispatch_integration.rs

`entity.delete` is `undoable: true` but has no undo/redo test. This is the generic entity delete (vs task-specific task.delete).

Scenario:
1. Verify a tag entity exists (e.g. one of the default tags created by board init)
2. Delete it via entity.delete with target "tag:{id}"
3. Verify tag is gone
4. app.undo — verify tag is restored with original fields
5. app.redo — verify tag is gone again

Follow the TestEngine pattern in command_dispatch_integration.rs. #coverage-gap
Add undo/redo test for entity.delete command
